name: engineering-team
description: Coordinate specialized agents to plan, deliver, secure, diagnose, and review complex software systems.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate complex delivery with specialist agents.
interface.longDescription: Install reusable specialist agents globally, then plan and deliver changes across application, API, client, protocol, data, infrastructure, security, documentation, and quality boundaries with stable public contracts, explicit ownership, current primary-source evidence, and independent verification.
defaultPrompt: Plan a complex change across system boundaries.
Review this change for cross-system risks.
